query:
-- Verificar se há múltiplos lotes do mesmo produto na mesma OR
SELECT 
  roi.receivingOrderId,
  roi.productId,
  COUNT(*) as num_lotes,
  GROUP_CONCAT(roi.batch) as lotes,
  GROUP_CONCAT(roi.expectedQuantity) as quantidades
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
GROUP BY roi.receivingOrderId, roi.productId
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
LIMIT 10;

  GROUP_CONCAT(roi.expectedQuantity) as quantidades
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
